granted.blastRadius: Updated basics-worker ECS task def env block (additive); revision :14
Created SES config set basics-runtime-outbound, SNS topic basics-ses-events, event destination, worker SES IAM policy; existing SES identity untouched
Additive: new public.workspace_output_quotas table with RLS, new SECURITY DEFINER function increment_output_quota

history.summary: Wired SENDBLUE_API_KEY, SENDBLUE_API_SECRET, SES_FROM_EMAIL, ARTIFACTS_S3_BUCKET into basics-worker task def; deploy clean; task-def revision :14 contains all 4 names.
First deploy attempt failed: Pulumi defaulted deliveryOptions.maxDeliverySeconds to 0; SES requires >= 300. SNS topic created (partial).

Option A: ref existing SES identity via data source; created NEW config set basics-runtime-outbound, SNS topic basics-ses-events + topic policy, SNS event destination for BOUNCE/COMPLAINT/DELIVERY, worker SES RolePolicy scoped to identity ARN + config set ARN. trybasics.ai identity left unmanaged (no MailFromDomain churn).

Applied migration automations_a3_output_quotas: workspace_output_quotas table (RLS-enabled, workspace-member SELECT policy matching cloud_runs convention) + SECURITY DEFINER function increment_output_quota(uuid,text,int). Fixture cap=2 calls returned [true,true,false] then cleanup. proname check passed.

operatorDecisions.note: Picked safest path that avoids touching production SES MailFromDomain or renaming existing config set.

operatorDecisions.decision: No git push between loop iterations
operatorDecisions.note: Push triggers redundant 45-min CI redeploy. Local commits only; push at phase/plan completion. Reflected in promp.txt step 10 and feedback memory.
